title: More Tools
description: Adds more tools and armor sets!
body:
## Summary

This mod adds more tools to offer a better progression system!

For some people, vanilla may have a large progression gap between existing materials, such as iron to diamond. This mod adds two (hoping to get three or four in the future) new toolsets: Copper and bronze.

This mod gives copper a new tool and armor set. Similar to Minecraft's latest snapshot, copper serves as a bridge between iron and stone in this mod.

This mod also intruduces bronze, a bridge between iron and diamond. Bronze has a higher enchantibility, durability, and mining speed than iron, but a lower attack damage. Bronze cannot mine any blocks an iron tool can't.

Bronze is crafted with one iron ingot and one copper ingot, in any arrangement. (Shapeless)
![Bronze crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc3bca2d49760e87f790a1d262db4f5ce2208d0b.png)

## Features
 - Copper Tools
 - Copper Armor
 - Bronze Tools

## How to use
Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api#download).
Requires the mod to be on both client and server.
